Program One is here: https://youtu.be/LWJ4um9QhqI Program Four is here: https://youtu.be/9qhgv2w0j4Y ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- A Bill Moyers Special Becoming AMERICAN THE CHINESE EXPERIENCE Program Two Between Two Worlds FFH 31783 Thomas Lennon, Series Producer Ruby Yang, Series Editor Copyright © FFH HOME VIDEO ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Between Two Worlds Abetted by the 1882 Chinese Exclusion Act, a wave of anti-Chinese sentiment swept across America. This program examines the exclusion years through the stories of Chinese Americans and their families who were kept apart by both ancient custom and U.S. law. These immigrants were trapped between countries, at home neither in the U.S. nor in China. The law of the land, which separated these families, also provided relief as Chinese Americans turned to the courts for justice. (90 minutes) https://www.pbs.org/becomingamerican/ BECOMING AMERICAN: The Chinese Experience was made possible by the generous support of Walter and Shirley Wang and by The Henry Luce Foundation, The Family of Hsien Hsien and Bae Pao Lu Chow, The Family of Kenneth and Mary Wang, the Herb Alpert Foundation, Sit Investment Associates, Sit Investment Foundation, The John D. and Catherine T.
